title: ECharts Segment 09
summary: This segment covers ECharts PRs #17995-#18904 (46 PRs across 12 dependency layers). It focuses on sunburst chart label and rotation fixes, sankey chart label/value/color improvements, pie chart endAngle and polar bar borderRadius features, axis pointer triggerEmphasis option, a large TypeScript strict-mode migration (PR #18338/#18420 touching 40+ files), i18n locale updates (German March abbreviation, new locale builds), universal transition deprecation cleanup, label ellipsis and hideOverlap improvements, scatter edge clipping, and release preparation (v5.4.2, v5.4.3).
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: This segment covers ECharts PRs #17995-#18904 (46 PRs across 12 dependency layers). It focuses on sunburst chart label and rotation fixes, sankey chart label/value/color improvements, pie chart endAngle and polar bar borderRadius features, axis pointer triggerEmphasis option, a large TypeScript strict-mode migration (PR #18338/#18420 touching 40+ files), i18n locale updates (German March abbreviation, new locale builds), universal transition deprecation cleanup, label ellipsis and hideOverlap improvements, scatter edge clipping, and release preparation (v5.4.2, v5.4.3).

nodes.label: Sunburst Chart Series
nodes.description: Sunburst chart fixes for label placement, radial label rotation, hideOverlap interaction, treepathInfo type definitions, and SunburstPiece rendering. Heavily connected in the dependency graph due to overlapping hunks with the large typing migration PRs. Touched by 7 PRs across layers 0-6.

nodes.label: Sankey Chart Series
nodes.description: Sankey chart improvements including label formatter value fix (node value was undefined), link color states support, and SankeyView rendering updates. PR #18222 fixes label style, PR #18733 fixes formatter value, PR #18834 adds link color states. Connected through the label system.

nodes.label: Pie, Bar & Helper Chart Series
nodes.description: Pie chart (endAngle feature, polar bar borderRadius, pieLayout/PieSeries), bar chart (BaseBarSeries markArea range fix, BarView/BarSeries sector helper), and shared chart helpers (sectorHelper, pieHelper, Line.ts). PR #17995 adds polar bar border radius support across pie/bar/sunburst.

nodes.label: Other Chart Types
nodes.description: Line chart (endLabel null data fix, SSR line labels, LineView), scatter chart (edge clipping at cartesian boundaries), tree chart (symbol callback type), and parallel series (value type fix). Minor fixes across several chart types.

nodes.label: UI Components
nodes.description: Axis pointer (triggerEmphasis option, AxisPointerModel, axisTrigger, modelHelper, viewHelper, BaseAxisPointer), tooltip (alwaysShowContent fix, TooltipHTMLContent, TooltipRichContent, TooltipView, seriesFormatTooltip, tooltipMarkup), visualMap (ContinuousModel/View, PiecewiseModel, VisualMapModel), legend (rich text color), and other components (BrushController, MapDraw, ToolboxView, dataZoom, marker, axis AxisBuilder, transform filterTransform).

nodes.label: Core Framework & Type System
nodes.description: Core echarts.ts (release version updates, deprecateDisconnect alias, typo fixes, echarts.all imports), utility layer (types.ts strict typing, states.ts focus-self emphasis, time.ts zero-padding, universalTransition), and model (Series.ts dataset length property). The large typing PRs #18338/#18420 touch types.ts extensively. 10 PRs touch src/util, 10 touch src/core.

nodes.label: Animation & Universal Transition
nodes.description: Universal transition system (universalTransition.ts). PRs add custom info events support, deprecation cleanup, and strict typing. Connected to the core lifecycle and the large typing migration.

nodes.label: Data Layer & Legacy
nodes.description: Data infrastructure (DataStore, Graph.ts, Source.ts dataset length property fix) and legacy compatibility (dataSelectAction). PR #18203 fixes Graph and DataStore issues, PR #18276 fixes Source.ts.

nodes.label: Label System
nodes.description: Label rendering infrastructure (labelStyle.ts, LabelManager.ts). PRs fix label ellipsis behavior, SSR line labels, sankey formatter value, and sunburst hideOverlap rotation. Connected to both chart series and the core rendering pipeline.

nodes.label: Coordinate Systems
nodes.description: Coordinate system layer (Axis.ts single-data-last-tick fix, CoordinateSystem.ts, Cartesian2D scatter edge clipping). Touched by scatter and pie/polar PRs that need coordinate transformations.

nodes.label: Internationalization & Build
nodes.description: Built i18n locale bundles (langCS, langDE, langSI, langTR, langVI, langZH in both obj and standard formats), German March abbreviation fix, build script (build.js updates for prepare/release), and release infrastructure. 4 PRs produce 2230 LOC of locale data across 12 files.

edges.label: sunburst uses LabelManager for hideOverlap and label placement
sankey label formatter depends on labelStyle infrastructure
sankey reads node values from Graph data structure
pie/bar polar rendering uses coordinate transformations
pie/bar series registered through core with type definitions
scatter clipping and line rendering depend on cartesian coordinates
chart series use shared type definitions
components use core model/view base classes and type system
axisPointer and dataZoom interact with coordinate axes
universal transition integrated into core echarts lifecycle
label infrastructure uses utility types and states
data layer uses model Series and utility types
locale bundles registered through core echarts
coordinate systems use shared type definitions
